title: The Fight to Euthanize Pablo Escobar’s Hippos in Colombia
summary_full: Colombia is planning to cull a population of wild hippos, the offspring of the drug lord’s pets, dividing a town where hippos are the main draw.
summary_public: Colombia is planning to cull a population of wild hippos, the offspring of the drug lord’s pets, dividing a town where hippos are the main draw.
